commits.message: FFS-3710: Implement "completed" statuses in progress indicator (#1348)
commits.author: Tom Dooner

commits.message:
FFS-3723: Implement education happy path progress calc + routing (#1350)

Now, adding an education will contribute to progress calculation. 80h will be counted if the person is found to be enrolled at least half-time for the entire reporting period. Note that there will be exceptions to this rule in the future, but those exceptions are out of scope for this ticket.
commits.author: Tim Miller

commits.message:
FFS-3734: Language selection not persisted between pages (#1351)

* Add locale to Argyle modal
* Fix and remove skip on run pinwheel token test
commits.author: Ben Calegari

commits.message:
FFS-3701: Add deductions to paystub object on json api (#1344)

Now, the paystubs object on the json api may contain an array of deductions objects as documented in the api spec.
commits.author: Tim Miller

commits.message:
FFS-3711: Add progress calculations to employment flow (#1333)

Now, the payment_details page will trigger a progress calculator check when the user navigates away. If the user has met the 80h/month threshold OR the $580/m threshold for ALL months in the reporting period, they will be routed to the summary page. Otherwise, they'll be taken back to the activity hub.
commits.author: Tim Miller

commits.message:
FFS-3707: Implement multi-month progress indicator (#1345)

* Allow the component to accept an array of monthly results
* Render each result next to each other
* Tweak styling and ERB logic to handle both cases
* Update component previews and tests
commits.author: Tom Dooner

commits.message: FFS-3714: Apply reporting window to employment flow (#1346)
commits.author: Daphne Gold

commits.message:
FFS-3722: Only save enrollments within the reporting window (#1347)

- Allow for modifying NSC stubs within the test itself
commits.author: Ben Calegari

commits.message:
Merge pull request #16 from DSACMS/infra/education

Infra/education
commits.author: Imhotep Benjamin

commits.message:
Add NSC education service, Redis & OAuth client

Introduce a new education package with an OAuth HTTP client (nscHTTPClient), a pluggable EducationService interface, and a concrete service implementation that handles Submit requests with structured slog logging. Split token/HTTP concerns to allow injecting a fake HTTP transport for tests and added unit tests for oauth, service constructor, and submit logic. Wire Redis into the app: add Redis client to api.Config, create and ping Redis in main, and pass the *redis.Client into route registration and the status router. Update routes to build per-endpoint circuit breakers backed by Redis and inject the education service and logger into the /api/edu handler. Misc: migrate logging from log to slog in affected handlers and add golang.org/x/oauth2 to go.mod.
commits.author: Imhotep Benjamin
